Package battleship.controller

Interface IBattleshipController

All Known Implementing Classes:
BattleshipController
public interface IBattleshipController
The interface of a controller from the perspective of a view object. All elements that are not part of this interface are invisible for the view.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ArrayList<Cards>
    enemyCards()
    Returns the enemyCardsList of game.
    ArrayList<Cards>
    gameCards()
    Returns the gameCardsList of game.
    GameState
    getState()
    Returns the gameState of game.
    ArrayList<Cards>
    handCards()
    Returns the handCardsList of game.
    void
    nextFrame()
    This method should be called whenever the controller should decide what the view should display.
    void
    setEnemyCards(ArrayList<Cards> enemyC)
    When the CardsList of players over network shared, that will be saved by controller in model, and the move will be on enemyCards in this way applied.
    void
    setState(GameState state)
    Set the game state.
    void
    updateSelfCard(int index, Cards card)
    If one side plays on card of other side, this will be occurred in model.
    void
    userInputE(int handCIndex, int enemyCIndex)
    Method that should be called whenever the user clicks on the game window.
    void
    userInputO(int handCIndex, int gameCIndex)
    Method that should be called whenever the user clicks on the game window.

  • Method Details

    • nextFrame

      void nextFrame()
      This method should be called whenever the controller should decide what the view should display. The controller will call one of the drawX()-Methods from the view.

    • userInputO

      void userInputO(int handCIndex, int gameCIndex)
      Method that should be called whenever the user clicks on the game window.
      Parameters:
      handCIndex - The index of selected handCard
      gameCIndex - The index of clicked own gameCard

    • userInputE

      void userInputE(int handCIndex, int enemyCIndex)
      Method that should be called whenever the user clicks on the game window.
      Parameters:
      handCIndex - The index of selected handCard
      enemyCIndex - The index of clicked enemyCard

    • gameCards

      ArrayList<Cards> gameCards()
      Returns the gameCardsList of game. It is used to take updated information from Model, but these can not be changed or saved by view.
      Returns:
      gameCardsList of game.

    • handCards

      ArrayList<Cards> handCards()
      Returns the handCardsList of game. It is used to take updated information from Model, but these can not be changed or saved by view.
      Returns:
      handCardsList of game.

    • enemyCards

      ArrayList<Cards> enemyCards()
      Returns the enemyCardsList of game. It is used to take updated information from Model, but these can not be changed or saved by view.
      Returns:
      enemyCardsList of game.

    • setEnemyCards

      void setEnemyCards(ArrayList<Cards> enemyC)
      When the CardsList of players over network shared, that will be saved by controller in model, and the move will be on enemyCards in this way applied.
      Parameters:
      enemyC - List of enemyCards

    • setState

      void setState(GameState state)
      Set the game state.
      Parameters:
      state - state of game.

    • getState

      GameState getState()
      Returns the gameState of game.
      Returns:
      game state.

    • updateSelfCard

      void updateSelfCard(int index, Cards card)
      If one side plays on card of other side, this will be occurred in model. But the information of ownCard has to be updated. Over network received information with the help of controller will be updated.
      Parameters:
      index - index of card, that has to be updated.
      card - the card, that is updated by the model of other side.
